pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile and run against Java 17, failing the migration goal to utilize Java 21 features or baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove spring-boot-starter-log4j dependency which is deprecated/removed in newer Spring Boot versions.
pom.xml.why_exists: The artifact spring-boot-starter-log4j does not exist in Spring Boot 2.x/3.x, causing a build failure if retained.
